text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The first hurdle on the road to the Classic Triple
Crown is upon us—the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I falter here, my dream of claiming the Classic
Triple Crown will vanish like smoke in the wind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, in that eventuality, I would of course seek
another way. My ideals are resilient enough to
survive defeat.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But that does not change my desire—nay, my
need to be victorious.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
After all, how can an Emperor with no crown win
the love of her people?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I believe that my dream is worthwhile, but if I am
to realize it, I must speak with authority.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That is why I must prove my supremacy, both in
title and in deed. That is why I must claim the
Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf speaks so fervently that it sets my
skin tingling. But suddenly her face falls.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still, I have hardly earned the right to make such
grand proclamations.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not when I have been so blind to the troubles of
my own student council.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It was disappointing, I admit, to find that I have
been left out of the loop.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It is hard to see myself as reliable when others
clearly do not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's got this all wrong. Air Groove and the rest
of the student council just didn't want to worry
her before a big race.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No, I understand. They were only trying to be
considerate.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But I would have preferred they hadn't.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Or rather, I wish they didn't feel such an
obligation.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Surely an Emperor's people must be able to rely
upon her for support at any time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to know what to say in response to that.
Considering the dream she's chasing, it only
makes sense for her to strive for perfection...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Clearly, I have yet to reach those heights... All
the more reason I must forge on.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I must show Air Groove and everyone else that
I'm strong enough to shoulder their burdens.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And the Satsuki Sho will be the first step on my
path to greatness.
